scores.correctness_notes: Misses the `scope` field entirely (valid values: `global`/`container`, required for subordinates). States `optional` defaults to `true` but gold standard says it defaults to `false`. Incorrectly claims peers have `limit: 1` always — gold standard example shows `limit: 150` for peers. Also omits interface naming restrictions (no `juju` prefix, only `a-z` and `-`).
scores.hallucination_notes: Two factual errors that constitute minor hallucinations: (1) `optional` default stated as `true` when it is `false`; (2) claim that peer relations always have `limit: 1` contradicted by gold standard showing `limit: 150` for a peer endpoint. The extra ops/charm-library section is contextually plausible but unverified against gold standard.
